endpoints.name: List all APIs
endpoints.description:
List all APIs in the directory.
Returns links to the OpenAPI definitions for each API in the directory.
If API exist in multiple versions `preferred` one is explicitly marked.
Some basic info from the OpenAPI definition is cached inside each object.
This allows you to generate some simple views without needing to fetch the OpenAPI definition for each API.

endpoints.name: Get basic metrics
endpoints.description:
Some basic metrics for the entire directory.
Just stunning numbers to put on a front page and are intended purely for WoW effect :)

endpoints.name: List all providers
endpoints.description: List all the providers in the directory

endpoints.name: Retrieve one version of a particular API
endpoints.description: Returns the API entry for one specific version of an API where there is no serviceName.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PROVIDER}} with a real provider. Replace {{API}} with a real api.

endpoints.name: Retrieve one version of a particular API with a serviceName.
endpoints.description: Returns the API entry for one specific version of an API where there is a serviceName.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PROVIDER}} with a real provider. Replace {{SERVICE}} with a real service. Replace {{API}} with a real api.

endpoints.name: List all APIs for a particular provider
endpoints.description:
List all APIs in the directory for a particular providerName
Returns links to the individual API entry for each API.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PROVIDER}} with a real provider.

endpoints.name: List all serviceNames for a particular provider
endpoints.description: List all serviceNames in the directory for a particular providerName
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PROVIDER}} with a real provider.
